raw_text: Revenue growth remained strong across services and installed base engagement improved. We saw strong demand in premium devices and raised guidance for the coming quarter. Foreign exchange headwinds and macroeconomic uncertainty remain a risk. Margin pressure persisted because of higher costs and input cost inflation.

Cloud revenue growth accelerated and record revenue was supported by strong demand in enterprise offerings. Management reported market share gains and an improved outlook. Competitive pressure and regulatory pressure remain elevated in some segments. Labor costs increased and operating expenses increased as AI infrastructure expanded.

Record revenue and accelerating demand supported strong growth in the data center business. The company expects revenue growth to continue, although supply chain disruption and customer softness may create uncertainty. Pricing pressure and elevated freight costs created cost pressure during the quarter.
